consent.title: Authorize access
consent.subtitle: An application wants to act on your behalf in LoreWeave.
consent.client_named: {{client}} is requesting access to your account.
consent.client_unnamed: An application is requesting access to your account.
consent.permissions_hint: Turn off anything you don't want to grant. You can grant less than requested, never more.
consent.no_scopes: Select at least one permission to continue.
consent.invalid_request: This authorization request is missing or has invalid information. Return to the application and try again.
consent.error: Could not complete authorization. Please try again.
